policy: Only high-value Epstein public-record developments may surface on the homepage, and only for a limited time. Alerts must have a source route, evidence class, checked date, and expiry date. A name, contact, settlement, filing, or redaction dispute is not proof of criminal conduct.

alerts.title: Judge orders DOJ to release more Epstein records or justify redactions by July 2
alerts.summary: A federal judge reportedly ordered DOJ to release less-redacted Epstein-related records or explain by July 2 why material should remain sealed. This is a disclosure-process lane, not a finding about the contents.

alerts.title: Maxwell habeas petition claims new Epstein-file evidence; prosecutors reject arguments
alerts.summary: Ghislaine Maxwell filed a habeas petition claiming new Epstein-file material undermines her conviction; U.S. prosecutors reportedly rejected her claims as untimely or legally baseless.
alerts.evidenceClass: Court-process update / litigation claim and government response

alerts.title: Epstein settlement and NDA lane moves into oversight focus
alerts.summary: Reporting says private settlements and NDAs involving Epstein accusers and associates are now part of the public-record oversight question. Settlements are not admissions of guilt.
